parsed_output.justification: Paul's claims regarding his role as the Seer are highly contradictory. He first states he knows who the minion is (Line 28) and that he looked at someone's card (Line 79), but later claims he actually looked at two cards in the center (Line 90). This inconsistency is a strong indicator that he is bluffing his role to hide his identity as a Werewolf. Additionally, Mike (the Revealer) identified Mitchell as the Tanner, and Alysha (the Seer) indicated the Minion was in the center, leaving Paul as the most probable Werewolf.
